metadata.greeting: This weekend in London looks amazing for families! I've found loads of free and exciting activities, from exploring city farms and museums to participating in Easter-themed events. Get ready for a fun-filled weekend!

activities.title: Young V&A
activities.address: Cambridge Heath Rd, Bethnal Green, E2 9PA
activities.description: Interactive galleries including Design, Imagine and Play with toys and objects relating to childhood. Mini Museum is a sensory space for under 2s.
activities.whyItWorks: Lots of hands-on exhibits, sensory experiences, and space to explore. Caters specifically to young children.

transport.fromHackney: Take the Overground to Bethnal Green.
transport.tip: Check the website for class times.

activities.title: Discover Children's Story Centre
activities.description: Immersive play spaces known as Story Worlds and the Story Garden playground. Baby Storytelling, crafts and singalongs.
activities.whyItWorks: Specifically designed for young children with lots of interactive elements.

transport.fromHackney: Take the Overground to Stratford.

activities.title: Hackney City Farm
activities.description: Meet farm animals, see the garden, and enjoy the cafe
activities.whyItWorks: Animals, outdoor space, short visit, free

transport.fromHackney: Walk or bus

activities.title: Biodiversity Playground
activities.description: Wooden playground designed for toddlers with a pond theme.
activities.whyItWorks: Specifically designed for toddlers, small and manageable.

transport.fromHackney: Take the Overground to Stratford.
transport.tip: Combine with a trip to the nearby Queen Elizabeth Olympic Park.

activities.title: Spitalfields Market Easter Art Workshops
activities.description: Free Easter Art Workshops with LuluJoelle.
activities.whyItWorks: Creative and hands-on, suitable for all ages and free.

transport.fromHackney: Take the Overground to Shoreditch High Street, then walk.
transport.tip: Check times of workshops in advance.

activities.title: Museum of London Docklands Easter Workshops
activities.description: Variety of Easter workshops, including making paper food, tea towel printing, creating your own packaging, painting with food, and making fruity loaves.
activities.whyItWorks: Hands-on and creative, plus the museum itself is very child-friendly.

transport.fromHackney: Take the Overground to Shadwell, then DLR to West India Quay.

activities.title: Super Nature at King's Cross
activities.description: Neighborhood-wide program of events, workshops, and activities celebrating nature. Free interactive trail revealing wildlife like bees, butterflies, and hedgehogs.
activities.whyItWorks: Outdoor exploration, opportunity to learn about nature, and free.

transport.fromHackney: Take the Overground to Highbury & Islington, then the Victoria line to King's Cross St. Pancras.
transport.tip: Check the program for family-friendly events at Camley Street Natural Park.

activities.title: Postal Museum
activities.description: The history of the Royal Mail including a mini underground train where you can ride through preserved mail tunnels. Little ones will love SORTED a postal themed soft play area where child can act out the role of the sorting office.
activities.whyItWorks: Interactive and fun, with a soft play area and train ride.

transport.fromHackney: Take the bus to Angel Station, then walk.

activities.title: Natural History Museum Easter Family Festival
activities.description: Learn from scientists and a person-sized T. Rex. Drop-in family talks and workshops, including LEGO Super Builder sessions.
activities.whyItWorks: Dinosaurs, hands-on activities, and free entry.

transport.fromHackney: Take the Overground to Highbury & Islington, then the Picadilly line to South Kensington.

activities.title: Science Museum
activities.description: Explore exhibits about space, technology, and transport. The Garden is an interactive space for younger children.
activities.whyItWorks: Interactive exhibits, great for curious minds, and free entry.

transport.fromHackney: Take the Overground to Highbury & Islington, then the Picadilly line to South Kensington.
transport.tip: The Wonderlab offers great hands-on experiences for a fee.

activities.title: Golders Hill Park Zoo
activities.description: Small zoo with rare species of birds and animals, including wallabies and lemurs.
activities.whyItWorks: Animals, outdoor space, and free entry.

transport.fromHackney: Take the Overground to Gospel Oak, then the Overground to Golders Green.
transport.tip: Combine with a visit to Hampstead Heath.

activities.title: Hampton Court Palace Tulip Festival
activities.description: See thousands of tulips in bloom across the palace gardens.
activities.whyItWorks: Beautiful outdoor space, visually stimulating, and lots of space to run around.

transport.fromHackney: Take the Overground to Liverpool Street, then a train to Hampton Court.
transport.tip: Combine with the Lindt Gold Bunny Hunt.

activities.title: Lindt Gold Bunny Hunt at Hampton Court Palace
activities.description: Follow a trail through the palace gardens and find hidden Lindt Gold Bunny statues to win a chocolate treat.
activities.whyItWorks: Outdoor activity, chocolate prize, and exploring a historic palace.

transport.fromHackney: Take the Overground to Liverpool Street, then a train to Hampton Court.

activities.title: Zoonormous Egg Hunt at London Zoo
activities.description: Search for giant Easter eggs hidden around the zoo and solve animal-themed clues.
activities.whyItWorks: Animals, outdoor activity, and puzzle-solving.

transport.fromHackney: Take the bus to Camden Town, then walk to the zoo.

activities.title: Battersea Park
activities.description: Scenic escape with gardens, a boating lake, playgrounds, and a mini zoo.
activities.whyItWorks: Lots of outdoor space, activities for all ages, and a mini zoo.

transport.fromHackney: Take the bus to Vauxhall, then walk to the park.
transport.tip: Check for special events during the Easter period.

activities.title: Paddington the Musical
activities.description: The beloved bear comes to life on stage in this musical adaptation.
activities.whyItWorks: Engaging for young children, familiar characters, and musical entertainment.

transport.fromHackney: Take the Overground to Shoreditch High Street, then the bus to the Strand.

activities.title: The Lion King
activities.description: Award-winning musical with puppetry and live music.
activities.whyItWorks: Visually stunning, familiar story, and great music.

transport.fromHackney: Take the Overground to Shoreditch High Street, then the bus to Aldwych.

activities.title: Matilda the Musical
activities.description: Musical with catchy Tim Minchin songs.
activities.whyItWorks: Funny, engaging, and great for older children.

transport.fromHackney: Take the Overground to Shoreditch High Street, then the bus to Cambridge Circus.

activities.title: The Everywhere Bear at Little Angel Theatre
activities.description: Show based on the book by Julia Donaldson with rhyme, puppets and original music.
activities.whyItWorks: Puppets, music and familiar characters.

transport.fromHackney: Take the bus to Angel Station, then walk.

activities.title: My First Ballet: Cinderella at Sadlers Wells
activities.description: Nature-loving Cinderella lives on the edge of an enchanted forest. A narrator helps young children to follow the story.
activities.whyItWorks: Narrator for younger children and visual storytelling.

transport.fromHackney: Take the bus to Holborn

activities.title: Unicorn Theatre Shows
activities.description: See 'Whatever the Weather,' 'The Lion Inside,' 'Home Song,' 'Huddle,' and 'Creatures'.
activities.whyItWorks: The Unicorn Theatre programs shows specifically geared towards young children.

transport.fromHackney: Take the bus to London Bridge, then walk.
transport.tip: Check the Unicorn Theatre website for specific showtimes and age recommendations.

activities.title: Easter Eggsplorers at Hobbledown Heath
activities.description: Themed egg trail, indoor and outdoor play, meet animals.
activities.whyItWorks: Adventure play, animals, and Easter themed.

transport.fromHackney: Take the train to Feltham, then bus.

activities.title: A Midsummer Night's Dream
activities.description: A Shakespearean play for kids
activities.whyItWorks: Classic tale

transport.fromHackney: Bus
